title: astragalus urbanus
intro: Astragalus urbanus, also known as the milkvetch plant, is a type of legume native to China and other parts of Asia, characterized by its small, white or purple flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus urbanus include reducing fatigue and improving overall physical performance, as well as enhancing immune function and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Astragalus urbanus is often combined with other herbs to create tonics and teas, and is commonly consumed as a capsule or tablet supplement.
